noteArchitectureCloseout.resultSummary: Recorded one bounded Architecture self-improvement result from runtime callable failure evidence. The retained product value is the already-materialized Architecture report/check surface around `architecture/lib/operational-architecture-improvement-candidates.ts`, which converts bounded callable `validation_error` evidence into a canonical Engine evaluation-quality Architecture candidate and routed handoff path instead of leaving the signal as ad hoc Runtime follow-up pressure.
